name: Build .NET Backend

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
    paths:
      - 'backend/PollsApi/**'
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build-backend:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
      
      - name: Setup .NET
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v4
        with:
          dotnet-version: 8.0
      
      - name: Restore dependencies
        run: dotnet restore ./backend/PollsApi
      
      - name: Build
        run: dotnet build ./backend/PollsApi --configuration Release --no-restore
      
      - name: Publish
        run: dotnet publish ./backend/PollsApi --configuration Release --output ./publish
      
      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: polls-api
          path: ./publish
